title: VerifyInput
description: Main-surface input for the verify primitive. FR-006. Delegation-only — KOSMOS never operates CA / HSM / VC issuer (FR-009).

family_hint.description: Expected authentication family. Mismatch vs session credentials → structured VerifyMismatchError (FR-010). Coercion prohibited.

session_context.description: Opaque caller-owned session payload forwarded to the external Korean national infrastructure. Shape is adapter-specific.
